mapper.select: select date_format(o.create_time, '%Y-%m') create_time, am.activity_name, am.price, count(1) num, sum(od.order_amount) amount from `order` o inner join order_detail od on o.id = od.order_id inner join activity_manage am on od.activity_id = am.id where o.create_time between #{currentMonthStart} and #{currentMonthEnd} and o.museum_id = #{museumId} and o.is_used = 1 and od.order_status = 10 and o.order_status in (10,-2) group by date_format(o.create_time, '%Y-%m'), am.activity_name, am.price order by am.activity_name

select o.unionpay_order_no trade_no from `order` o where o.create_time between #{currentMonthStart} and #{currentMonthEnd} and o.museum_id = #{museumId} and o.order_status in (10, -2, -11) and o.appointment_date is not null and date_format(o.appointment_date, '%Y-%m') > date_format(#{currentMonthEnd}, '%Y-%m')
